texto: 1 John 1:4 "These things [are written] that your joy may be full." I can always measure the amount of time I'm spending in the Scriptures by how much joy (not superficial happiness, but deep down abiding joy) I have. When I find a lack of joy in my life, the first thing I check is how much time I'm spending in God's Word!
explicacao: Citação de Evelyn Christenson sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “1 John 1:4 "These things [are written] that your joy may be full." I can always measure the amoun…” articula felicidade, god-s-word, happiness em registro de felicidade, com relevância para contextos como termino e happiness.
